PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Ann Holman, petitioner in pro per.

The Court inquired if the petitioner would be engaging the services of an attorney. Ms. Holman responded in the negative. She said that she was currently serving as administrator of the estates of her grandmother and her uncle, and that she had lost confidence in the attorney who had been representing her in those proceedings and that they had parted ways on bad terms. She said that the only asset of her grandmother's estate had been her home which has now been sold, with the proceeds to be distributed in equal shares to the estates of her mother and uncle. She said that the proceeds of the sale was the only aset of her mother's estate, and that if her petition was granted she would proceed by giving notice to potential claimants and by the preparation of an inventory and appraisal. She stated that she is receiving advice from a person who is familiar with probate procedures and forms, but who is not an attorney or paralegal. To address procedural matters, the matter was continued to September 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
